title: Gently Woodfired Mediterranean Rhubarb Bake
description: A tender and light Mediterranean dish featuring rhubarb, baked to perfection in a wood-fired oven, with a balance of bitter and sweet flavors. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is perfect for a unique dessert or snack.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, honey, lemon juice, garlic, thyme, and salt.
Add the chopped rhubarb to the bowl and toss to coat with the oil and spice mixture.
Transfer the rhubarb mixture to a cazuela dish.
Sprinkle the chopped pine nuts over the top of the rhubarb.
Bake the rhubarb in the preheated wood-fired oven for 35 minutes, or until tender.
Remove the rhubarb from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the rhubarb warm, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
